name: Elliot Anderson
about: 3 years in athletic apparel at Lululemon and Alo Yoga flagships. Strong closer who exceeds targets on launch days. Retailers note his energy and product knowledge.
interviewTranscript: I used to work at Lululemon. I worked there for roughly around a year. It was a very cool experience. I was able to be in an environment where it was very busy every day, help a lot of customers, a lot of interactions. Speak to people from different countries because there's a lot of people visiting. I think Reflex will be good for me because I'm able to work on the side and save up money. A time I was able to help a customer out and go above and beyond was they wanted a specific style that we didn't have in our specific store, but we were able to call a different store and I was able to make sure they had it and that customer was satisfied. I like to be social but also know how to be determined and hardworking and I know like the time and place—there's sometimes you could maybe talk to your co-workers or there's not a time and I'd like to get things done beforehand rather than wait and procrastinate.
